From Stormhill Shack, follow the uphill road to the castle entrance. Head inside and grab the Castleward Tunnel grace in an alcove.
🏆 MISSABLE: Defeat Margit, the Fell Omen for Talisman Pouch and 12,000 runes.
Optional: Rogier's summon sign can be found outside the entrance.
Activate the Margit, the Fell Omen grace, then grab the Stormveil Main Gate grace in front of the gate.
Descend the stairs northeast of the grace for a Furlcalling Finger Remedy.
Drop to the wooden platform below the stairs to find Fire Grease x2 at the end of a small tunnel.
Optional: Return to the gate and talk to Gostoc. Don't worry about the main gate, you can open it yourself later.
Go through the hole in the wall and pick up the Golden Rune [1] immediately on the left, then the Ruin Fragment x3 on the nearby ledge.
Continue to a broken wall but instead of dropping down, climb it up to discover a corpse with Smithing Stone [2].
After dropping down, head south-southeast and down the slope to find Bolt x10 at the end.
Head up the slope for a Smithing Stone [3] guarded by Stormhawks on the left side.
Continue north and drop down to discover the Stormveil Cliffside grace.
Pick up Marred Leather Shield from the corpse up the first set of stairs.
Before you enter the castle, pick up the Golden Rune [2] on the scaffolding around the entrance.
Head inside and loot the Hookclaws in a corner on the first floor.
Note: Gostoc will now steal 30% of your runes each time you die inside the castle.
Go up the stairs and pick up the Throwing Dagger x5 in a narrow passage next to a locked door.
Pick up St. Trina's Arrow x10 from a hole in the wall covered with vines.
Back inside, jump to the ledge east-southeast of the hole for a Golden Rune [2], then back across to grab the Smoldering Butterfly x3 in front of the barrels.
Enter the room at the top. Kill the knight to unlock the door, then loot the corpse for Rusty Key and the chest for Curved Sword Talisman.
MISSABLE: Unlock the earlier door and step through the doorway at the top of the ladder. This will trigger Gostoc to spawn on the first floor. Talk to him to receive a Grace Mimic. [Location 2]
Kill the greataxe-wielding soldier next to him, then return to the top of the ladder. Head northwest first for a Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot.
Head outside and go around the ledge below the stairs to find Mushroom x3.
Ascend the outside stairs, then the first set of stairs inside. Grab the Rampart Tower grace in the north room, but do not rest at it.

Head out the north exit and run for the downward staircase that leads to a rooftop past the Stormhawks. Either kill them or lose their aggro, then fast travel to the Rampart Tower grace. You should now see Gostoc behind a nearby lift. Talk to him and he'll stop stealing your runes. Also pick up the Drawstring Fire Grease x2 beside him.

Note: If he's not there, check to see if he's stuck at his earlier location. Clear his path of enemies, run to the stairs past the Stormhawks without resting, then teleport to the Rampart Tower and he should appear. [Location 4]
Descend the stairs with a Banished Knight close by and look for thorny vines outside. Drop to the ledge below the vines and follow it to a hole in the wall with Arteria Leaf x3.
Drop onto the wooden platform inside, then go across the plank for a corpse with Fire Grease.
Jump to the elevated platform near the plank and head down the outside scaffolding to pick up the Brick Hammer.
Travel to the Rampart Tower and head outside toward the Stormhawks. Drop down below the left side balcony and pick up the Marred Wooden Shield below a thin ledge.
Continue down until the platform collapses. After landing, take out the scarab to obtain Ash of War: Storm Assault.
Kill the Crucible Knight for Aspects of the Crucible: Horns. If you want to play it safe, you could run a short distance past him to grab a shortcut lift.
Pick up the Somber Smithing Stone [2] in the alcove near the Crucible Knight.
Take the shortcut lift back to the Rampart Tower and go up the stairs. Jump across the lift's wheels to pick up Throwing Dagger x5.
Continue outside to pick up a Golden Rune [2] from a wooden platform.
Jump onto the stone fence and follow it to the southeast tower. Then, jump to the ledge around the east tower and drop down inside it for a Stonesword Key.
Pick up the Dozing Cross-Legged gesture from the corpse on the rooftop below.
Head around the thin ledge of the tower west of the gesture to find a corpse with Smithing Stone [2] x2.
Go back to the rooftops, then go around the ledge up a slanted pillar. Climb the ladder in front of a tower and pick up the Claw Talisman at the top.
Return to the Rampart Tower and loot the Smithing Stone [2] at the end of the rampart with the Stormhawks.
A corpse with Golden Rune [2] lies on the rooftop down the stairs.
From the corpse, turn southeast and jump to the lower part of the roof for Kukri x5.
Optional: Enter through the window and talk to Rogier next to the altar. Answer that you're here to defeat Godrick.
Exit the church and continue to a room with Golden Rune [2] x2.
Continue until you reach a room with a Banished Knight, then open the chest next to a table for Mimic's Veil.
Exit the room the way you entered, then climb the sacks against the fence to an area with a Gold-Pickled Fowl Foot.
Head up the wooden platform and climb the ladder at its end. Drop down straight ahead and enter the dark room for a Stonesword Key and a chest with Pickled Turtle Neck x3.
Turn back and open the shortcut door, then descend the stairs to the dark room. Below the staircase lies an Exalted Flesh.
Loot the Highland Axe and Stanching Boluses from the room with the Grafted Scion (won't respawn if killed).
At the west-southwest end of the room is a shortcut lift back to the Rampart Tower if you need to rest.
Enter the south-southeast room to pick up Crimson Hood, Lump of Flesh, and Golden Rune [1] around a pile of corpses.

Note: If Roderika still hasn't moved to Roundtable Hold, you'll find the Chrysalid's Memento instead of the hood. You'll need to follow her questline at the roundtable until she becomes a spirit tuner. She'll then throw away her hood, which replaces the memento.
Enter the north-northwest room and pick up the Somber Smithing Stone [2] beneath the statue on the right.
Requires 1 Stonesword Key: Unlock the imp seal and loot the Hawk Crest Wooden Shield, Misericorde, and Iron Whetblade in the room.
Head through the remaining doorway in the dark room. Immediately on the left is a staircase that leads to Arrow x10 on a wooden platform.
Enter the courtyard, then immediately head left to find a cellar entrance. Pick up the Fireproof Dried Liver beside a table.
Requires 1 Stonesword Key: Unlock the imp seal and open the two chests to obtain Godslayer's Seal and Godskin Prayerbook.
Pick up the Golden Rune [4] on the outside ledge. Remember this ledge, because you'll return here to drop down later.
For now, climb the ladder to the left of the cellar exit and pick up Arrow x10 from behind a barrel.
Continue to another ladder. At the top of it lies a corpse with Festering Bloody Finger x3.

Note: Skip this item until you've received your first Festering Bloody Fingers from Varre in South Liurnia. Picking it up now makes About Invasion Multiplayer unobtainable for the rest of the playthrough. For more info, see Varre's questline.
Continue past the Banished Knights and across the wooden bridge for a ladder that leads to the Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook [10] on a wooden platform.
From the wooden platform, jump onto the roof next to it, then drop down the hole to find a corpse with Wooden Greatshield.
Head down the stairs and look to the right past some trees to find Mushroom x8 in a corner.
On the nearby stairs lies a corpse with Furlcalling Finger Remedy.
Pick up the Smithing Stone [1] x2 in the alley west of the stairs, then grab the Liftside Chamber grace in the room next to it.
Enter the courtyard and grab the "Prophecy" Painting from the room on the west side.
Loot the Magic Grease, Golden Rune [1], 2x Golden Rune [2], Pike, and Smoldering Butterfly x5 around the flamespitters in the courtyard.
Pick up the Golden Rune [4] and Kukri x5 on the incline that leads up to the courtyard.
Return to the courtyard and pick up Fire Arrow x12 from a wooden guard post.
Head through the cellar again and drop down the ledge from earlier. Pick up the Smithing Stone [2] behind the ballistas, then go down the stairs for a Smithing Stone [1].
Enter the room to the right of the main gate to grab a Golden Rune [5] and the Gateside Chamber grace.
Through the door past the grace sits a corpse with Commoner's Simple Garb.
Push the lever to open the main gate if Gostoc didn't do it earlier, then loot the Ballista Bolt x5, Golden Rune [2], and Golden Rune [1] behind the gate.
Kill the Elder Lion in the corner on the right at the top of the slope for Somber Smithing Stone [1], Beast Blood, and Old Fang x2.
Go through the east-northeast corridor to grab the Limgrave Tower Bridge grace for later.

Head back through the corridor and to a doorway that leads to multiple sets of stairs. Jump up the rocks left of the stairs, then onto the cliff on the opposite side to grab the Arbalest from a walled area.
Travel to the Liftside Chamber, go up the nearby stairs, then up the staircase on the left that leads to a Smithing Stone [2].
Turn back and head past the spiked barricades for a Golden Rune [2] beside some breakable crates.
MISSABLE: Enter the room on the right and exhaust Nepheli's dialogue for a talisman later.
Pick up the Smithing Stone [1] x4 in the corner of the room.
Exit the room and pick up the Golden Seed between two trees to the right of the path.
In an alley between two houses on the right, you'll find a Smithing Stone [2].
Bait the Troll into following you and attacking the fallen statue back in the courtyard to obtain 5x Smithing Stone [1] and a Smithing Stone [2].
Return to the stairs and grab the Secluded Cell grace in the room on the right before of the boss.
Kill the scarab past the southwest doorway to obtain Ash of War: Stormcaller.
Pick up the 2x Cracked Pot behind the Living Jars in the back.
Optional: Beyond the south-southeast doorway is a shortcut lift that goes down to the Liftside Chamber.
On a wooden ledge northeast of the jars sits a corpse with Kukri x8.
Jump to the ledge on the wall and follow it to a ledge with two archways. In the area past them, you'll find Lump of Flesh x3.
Climb the sacks and head through the doorway. At the top of the room, turn right for Smithing Stone [2] x3 on a wooden ledge.
Pick up Golden Rune [2] and Smithing Stone [1] from a nook ahead of the next room.
Beneath the stairs at the bottom floor of the room, you'll find the Manor Towershield.
Pick up the Smithing Stone [3] next to the glowing message outside.
Drop onto the ledge below and make your way down to a Golden Rune [5] hanging off a balcony.
Grab the Rainbow Stone x5 inside, then open the shortcut door east of the corpse.
Return to the corpse and jump across the broken platforms to reach a corpse with Arteria Leaf on the other side.
At the end of a broken buttress sits a corpse with Smithing Stone [2] x2.
Drop to the bottom for a Golden Rune [2] in the corner.
Pick up the Poisonbloom x3 past the rats, then kill the scarab just past it to obtain Rancorcall.
Kill the Ulcerated Tree Spirit in the arena below for a Golden Seed. This will also unlock Rogier's dialogue about the corpse under Stormveil for later.
Loot the Smoldering Butterfly x3, Stonesword Key, and Throwing Dagger x8 from the corpses in the arena.
Pick up the Prince of Death's Pustule next to the squid-like visage at the end.
🏆 Travel to the Secluded Cell and kill Godrick the Grafted for Godrick's Great Rune, Remembrance of the Grafted, and 20,000 runes.
Optional: Nepheli's summon sign can be found near the entrance if you exhausted her dialogue earlier.
Rest at the Godrick the Grafted grace, then talk to Gostoc in the arena.
Head through the throne room and grab the Shabriri Grape on the bottom floor.
Go outside and talk to Hyetta next to the Lake-Facing Cliffs. Give her the Shabriri Grape to learn the As You Wish gesture.
Optional: Talk to Boc next to the Lake-Facing Cliffs grace and select "Don't tell me…".
Travel to the Limgrave Tower Bridge and pick up the Boltdrake Talisman up the stairs.
In the crater on the right before the Archer Golem, you'll find a Warming Stone.
Loot the Soft Cotton and Ash-of-War Scarab down the rubble at the end of the bridge.
Use the sending gate to reach the other side. Pick up the Golden Rune [2] on a balcony, then grab the Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot next to the Golem remains.
At the end of the bridge is a corpse with Stormhawk Feather x5 hanging off the right side edge.
Go back and ride the lift in the tower to reach the Divine Tower of Limgrave grace.
🏆 Interact with the rune at the top and restore the power of Godrick's Great Rune.
Note: Great Runes can be equipped at sites of grace and activated with Rune Arcs. The effects are lost on death, so you'll need a new Rune Arc each time you die.
